headline: Is Diamondback Energy, Inc. (FANG) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is FANG a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Diamondback Energy, Inc. on X.com by @MoneyShow. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on FANG. Diamondback Energy, Inc.’s share was trading at $ 191.48 as of May 29th. FANG’s trailing and forward P/E were 195.39 and 8.58 respectively according to […]
